Title: Login success
Steps: Open app; enter valid username/password; click Login
Expected Result: Access granted; sidebar shows signed-in user and role; sign_in success logged

Title: Invalid password rejected
Steps: Enter correct username + wrong password; click Login
Expected Result: Generic invalid credential error; no access; sign_in failed logged

Title: Unknown username rejected
Steps: Enter random username/password; click Login
Expected Result: Generic invalid credential error; no user enumeration

Title: Account lockout after max attempts
Steps: Submit wrong password repeatedly until threshold
Expected Result: Account temporarily locked; lock message shown; only target user affected

Title: Admin unlocks locked user
Precondition: User is locked and admin exists
Steps: Login as admin; User Management > Unlock User; select user; submit
Expected Result: User can log in immediately; unlock_user event logged

Title: Deactivate user blocks login
Steps: Admin deactivates user; target user attempts login
Expected Result: Login blocked with account disabled behavior

Title: Reactivate user restores login
Steps: Admin activates user; target user logs in
Expected Result: Login succeeds

Title: Forced password change on temp password
Steps: Login as temp-password user; set strong new password
Expected Result: App blocks feature access until change; re-login required

Title: Password policy enforcement
Steps: Try weak passwords (no uppercase/no number/no symbol/short) in change/reset/create flows
Expected Result: Weak password rejected with clear rule message

Title: Logout logs event
Steps: Click Logout
Expected Result: Session cleared; login screen shown; sign_out event logged

Title: Cannot delete own account
Steps: Admin User Management > Delete User; try selecting self if possible
Expected Result: Operation blocked with safety message

Title: Cannot delete last active admin
Steps: Try to delete that admin
Expected Result: Operation blocked; last admin preserved

Title: Create standard user
Steps: Create user role=user with strong temp password
Expected Result: User created; can log in

Title: Create admin user
Steps: Create user role=admin with strong temp password
Expected Result: Admin user created; admin panel available after login

Title: Duplicate username prevented
Steps: Attempt to create same username
Expected Result: Creation rejected with duplicate message

Title: Manager password reset flow
Steps: Reset target password to temporary strong value
Expected Result: User must change password on next login; password_reset event logged

Title: Delete user removes access
Steps: Delete user from admin panel
Expected Result: User removed; future login fails; delete_user event logged

Title: Auth logs CSV download
Precondition: Admin logged in with events present
Steps: Click Download Auth Logs (CSV)
Expected Result: CSV downloads and contains timestamp/username/event/status/detail

Title: Valid CSV sync end-to-end
Precondition: CSV has review column and valid DB connections
Steps: Upload CSV; set company; confirm; click Sync
Expected Result: Sentiment enrichment runs; Cosmos and Postgres sync succeed

Title: Missing review column handled
Steps: Upload CSV and sync
Expected Result: Error shown; sync not performed

Title: Separator handling
Steps: Upload same CSV with wrong separator then auto-detect/correct separator
Expected Result: Wrong separator fails gracefully; correct setting succeeds

Title: Large file stability
Steps: 5k rows)
Expected Result: Upload and sync large file
Priority: Progress updates; no crash; completes or controlled error

Title: Company name sanitization
Steps: Enter company with special chars; sync
Expected Result: Stored company value is sanitized safely

Title: Postgres mirror failure path
Steps: Run sync
Expected Result: Clear error shown for mirror step; no false success

Title: Positive review request works
Steps: Query: show positive reviews for [company]; execute
Expected Result: Relevant rows returned; analyst briefing rendered

Title: Natural language noisy query fallback
Steps: Ask verbose unstructured question; execute
Expected Result: System still extracts/fallbacks and returns useful analysis when possible

Title: No exact match fallback behavior
Steps: Query niche term unlikely to match; execute
Expected Result: Fallback retrieval used; avoids unnecessary dead-end where possible

Title: Unsupported metric guarded response
Steps: Query revenue/churn/NPS question; execute
Expected Result: Analyst states metric unavailable in dataset; no hallucinated numbers

Title: Blank query no-op
Steps: Leave query blank; click Execute Analysis
Expected Result: No crash; no invalid query execution

Title: Section visible without fresh upload
Steps: Open app in new session without uploading
Expected Result: Bottom Filter and Download section still appears from DB data

Title: Company filter correctness
Steps: Select one/multiple companies
Expected Result: Table rows reflect selected companies only

Title: Sentiment filter correctness
Steps: Select sentiment values
Expected Result: Table rows reflect selected sentiments only

Title: Rating filter correctness
Steps: Select one/multiple ratings
Expected Result: Table rows reflect selected ratings only

Title: Date range filter correctness
Steps: Set narrow and broad ranges
Expected Result: Rows constrained to selected dates

Title: Filtered CSV export integrity
Steps: Click Download Filtered Export
Expected Result: CSV matches on-screen filtered dataset

Title: Fallback when Postgres unavailable
Precondition: Session data exists and PG unavailable
Steps: Open filter section with PG down
Expected Result: Section still usable via session fallback, with appropriate message

Title: Scoped company delete
Steps: Select company; confirm; click Delete Company Data
Expected Result: Only selected company data removed from Cosmos/Postgres

Title: Full wipe confirmation gate
Steps: Type DELETE and check confirmation; click Wipe All Data
Expected Result: All data removed; container/table reset; session state cleared

Title: Post-delete UI refresh correctness
Steps: Observe dashboard after delete/wipe
Expected Result: Filters/summary reflect latest DB state (no stale data)

Title: Sign-in event fields populated
Steps: Perform successful login
Expected Result: auth_events row has timestamp/username/event/status/detail

Title: Failed sign-in event logging
Steps: Attempt invalid login
Expected Result: Failed event captured with detail

Title: Sign-out event logging
Steps: Click Logout
Expected Result: sign_out success event recorded with timestamp

Title: Admin actions logged
Steps: Run each admin action once
Expected Result: Corresponding auth_events rows recorded

Title: SQL injection-like input safely handled
Steps: Try username like ' OR 1=1 -- and login
Expected Result: No bypass; safe failure

Title: Session isolation across browsers
Steps: Log in as different users in separate sessions
Expected Result: Actions/sessions isolated per user

Title: Login responsiveness
Steps: Measure login interaction under normal load
Expected Result: Acceptable response with no blocking modal click dependency

Title: Filter responsiveness with moderate volume
Steps: Apply multiple filters quickly
Expected Result: UI remains responsive; no crash

Title: AI response latency smoke
Steps: Run 3 representative AI queries
Expected Result: Responses return within acceptable operational window
